name: scoremodel-torch-cuda
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'cd /workspaces/scoremodel && python -m pip install -U pip setuptools wheel && pip install torch torchvision torchaudio --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu124 && pip install -r requirements.txt && pip install -e . && python -c "import torch; print(\"torch\", torch.__version__, \"cuda:\", torch.cuda.is_available())"'
